hero.title: Yolman oto – Car Sales and Financing in Turkey and Oman
hero.subtitle: Buy reliable cars at competitive prices with flexible financing plans
hero.description: We provide integrated solutions including: cash car sales, car financing up to 24 months, lease-to-own options with clear terms, imported cars, and auctions

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Yolman oto?
whyChooseUs.description: We believe buying a car should be a clear and well-informed decision. That’s why we provide a transparent experience built on detailed inspections and clear contracts to ensure your peace of mind at every step.

points.title: Full Transparency in Vehicle Information
points.text: We provide accurate and complete details about each vehicle, including specifications, technical condition, and usage history when available.

points.title: Clear Disclosure of Paint & Replacements
points.text: Any repainting or part replacements are clearly disclosed with no hidden information.

points.title: Comprehensive Technical Inspection
points.text: Every vehicle undergoes a thorough technical inspection to ensure safety and quality before being offered for sale.

points.title: Clear & Fair Contracts
points.text: We use straightforward contracts that protect the rights of all parties without hidden terms.

points.title: Expertise in Turkey & Oman Markets
points.text: Deep understanding of customer needs and market dynamics in Istanbul, Muscat, and other major cities.

points.title: Professional After-Sales Support
points.text: We maintain ongoing communication and support even after the purchase is completed.

whyChooseUs.footerNote: Our goal is for you to buy your car with confidence and complete peace of mind

carCategories.title: Available Car Types for Sale in Turkey & Oman
carCategories.description: We offer a carefully selected range of vehicles to suit different needs and budgets — whether for daily commuting, family use, or those seeking luxury and performance.

economy.title: Economy Cars
economy.description: The ideal choice for daily use in cities like Istanbul and Muscat.
keywords: Economy cars for sale in Turkey

family.title: Family Cars
family.description: Designed for families and long trips with enhanced comfort and safety.
keywords: Family cars for sale in Oman

suv.title: SUV & Crossover Vehicles
suv.description: Highly demanded in both Oman and Turkey for their strength and elevated driving position.

midLuxury.title: Mid-Range & Luxury Cars
midLuxury.description: For those seeking premium performance and advanced features.

importAuction.title: Imported & Auction Cars
importAuction.description: We provide imported and auction vehicles at competitive prices with full transparency and inspection.

financingSection.title: Financing & Lease-to-Own Solutions
financingSection.description: We offer flexible financing options to help you own your car easily and securely in Turkey and Oman, with clear contracts and fast procedures.

leaseToOwn.title: Lease-to-Own System
leaseToOwn.description: A flexible system that allows you to own the car after a defined contractual period with clear terms.
